_meta.purpose: Testing readability scoring and cognitive load calculation against known values

readability_samples.label: Children's Book Level
readability_samples.text: The dog ran fast. It was brown. The dog liked to play. It played in the park. The park was big and green.

readability_samples.label: Standard News Article
readability_samples.text: Scientists discovered a new species of deep-sea fish last Tuesday. The creature, found at depths exceeding three kilometers, displays bioluminescent properties previously unknown to researchers. The discovery may help explain how life adapts to extreme environments.

readability_samples.label: Academic / Technical Text
readability_samples.text: The epistemological implications of phenomenological reductionism necessitate a comprehensive reexamination of ontological presuppositions inherent within contemporary cognitive neuroscientific frameworks. Such paradigmatic reconceptualization fundamentally challenges anthropocentric assumptions.

readability_samples.label: Medical Information
readability_samples.text: Attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) is a neurodevelopmental disorder characterized by inattention, hyperactivity, and impulsivity. Symptoms typically emerge in childhood and may persist into adulthood. Treatment includes behavioral therapy and pharmacological interventions such as stimulant medications.

readability_samples.label: Figurative Language Heavy
readability_samples.text: It was raining cats and dogs outside when Sarah finally hit the nail on the head. She was under the weather but once in a blue moon she had a golden opportunity that she couldn't let slip through her fingers.
readability_samples.note: Low grade but high autism difficulty due to figurative language

llm_simplification_benchmarks.input: The acceleration of gravitational forces on objects of varying mass demonstrates consistent proportionality.
acceptable_outputs: Objects fall at the same speed when dropped.
Gravity pulls all objects down at the same rate.
Heavy and light objects fall at the same speed.

llm_simplification_benchmarks.input: Individuals diagnosed with attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder frequently demonstrate challenges with executive function, working memory capacity, and sustained cognitive engagement.
acceptable_outputs: People with ADHD often have trouble focusing, remembering things, and staying on task.
ADHD makes it hard to pay attention, remember things, and finish tasks.

dom_noise_detection_samples.html_alt: A photo of the Golden Gate Bridge at sunset
